summary_en: 6,713,200 common shares (3.7% of issued shares) cancelled effective 2026-05-15 pursuant to Companies Act Article 178. Post-cancellation issued share count: 176,337,900 shares.
title_en: Notification of Completion of Share Cancellation (Cancellation of Treasury Shares pursuant to Company Law Article 178)
translation_en_brief: Electric Power Development Co., Ltd. completed the cancellation of 6,713,200 common shares on 2026-05-15 pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act. The cancellation was resolved by the Board of Directors on 2026-04-30. The cancelled shares represented 3.7% of the issued share count prior to cancellation. Following the cancellation, the total number of issued shares stands at 176,337,900.
